mapper.select: -- LOG OFF SELECT CASE WHEN SQ_TYPE = 'R' THEN -1 WHEN SQ_TYPE != 'R' OR SQ_TYPE IS NULL THEN NVL(SQ_CNT,0) END FROM s_common_seq_cnt WHERE SQ_TABLE_NM = #{TableName}
mapper.update:
-- LOG OFF
UPDATE s_common_seq_cnt SET SQ_CNT = NVL(SQ_CNT,0) + 1 WHERE SQ_TABLE_NM = #{TableName}

SELECT ${SEQUENCE_NAME}.NEXTVAL FROM dual
SELECT LAST_NUMBER FROM user_sequences WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME = #{SEQUENCE_NAME}
